title: Sovereign AI AIRR launch opportunity: call for researchers
body: "This call is open to high-ambition researchers with short term project proposals in the following priority areas:   fundamental AI research (especially embodied AI)  AI for biosciences  AI for materials discovery  AI for defence and national security   Applicants must be:   from a research group in a university or public sector research organisation UK-based for the duration of the project    This call will close at 11:59pm BST on 7 July 2025.   "
